evidence: "Good story about 3 Dutch children that are impacted by those whose families are in the resistance vs those whose families collaborated with the Nazis."
"The story is complex enough to keep you interested."
"I like the show because it explores issues from various viewpoints that show how there are often not clear cut lines between right and wrong."
"However, somehow the characters were so one-dimensional it just felt like we were rushed to the ending."
"The likable characters all seem damaged in different ways making it interesting how they work together to achieve their goal."
"It is a well written script and this memorable film is a pleasure to both view and to listen."
"Gorgeous setting and definitely faith-based but not preachy."
"Beautiful film about the lives of the people who played this violin."
"Extremely interesting as the stories depict overzealous lawyers... Shows how personal issues get in the way of doing the right thing more often than not."

summary: The user enjoys complex, well-written dramas with strong emotional resonance and high production quality. They appreciate stories that explore deep themes and character development, often with a feel-good or heartwarming element.
